title: pykickstart bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[3.32.15-1.0.1]
- Support btrfs partition command in RHEL9_Partition class
  [Orabug: 33796791]
- Fix exception in installer.
- Sync OL 8 command handlers with upstream [Orabug: 31683439]
- Don't exit installer if btrfs is specified for autopart [Orabug: 31192722]
- Don't exit installer with message that btrfs is unsupported [Orabug: 31192722]
- Fix crash when using btrfs [Orabug: 30792917]
- Remove the RHSM command [Orabug: 30902364]
- drop syspurpose command [Orabug: 29443881]
- Include the OL8 Handler class in the commandMap [Orabug: 29373077]
- Make sure version is output properly for OL [Orabug: 20440019]
- Alter tools to recognize OL version strings [Orabug: 20440019]
- Enable Oracle Linux handlers

[3.32.15-1]
- workflows: run tests using only python 3.9 (bcl)
  Related: RHEL-75659
- workflows: Switch to using ubuntu-latest (bcl)
  Related: RHEL-75659
- Do not remove 'md' prefix from RAID names (vtrefny)
  Resolves: RHEL-75659
full_text:
[3.32.15-1.0.1]
- Support btrfs partition command in RHEL9_Partition class
  [Orabug: 33796791]
- Fix exception in installer.
- Sync OL 8 command handlers with upstream [Orabug: 31683439]
- Don't exit installer if btrfs is specified for autopart [Orabug: 31192722]
- Don't exit installer with message that btrfs is unsupported [Orabug: 31192722]
- Fix crash when using btrfs [Orabug: 30792917]
- Remove the RHSM command [Orabug: 30902364]
- drop syspurpose command [Orabug: 29443881]
- Include the OL8 Handler class in the commandMap [Orabug: 29373077]
- Make sure version is output properly for OL [Orabug: 20440019]
- Alter tools to recognize OL version strings [Orabug: 20440019]
- Enable Oracle Linux handlers

[3.32.15-1]
- workflows: run tests using only python 3.9 (bcl)
  Related: RHEL-75659
- workflows: Switch to using ubuntu-latest (bcl)
  Related: RHEL-75659
- Do not remove 'md' prefix from RAID names (vtrefny)
  Resolves: RHEL-75659

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20770.html
